title: N-digit Fibonacci Number
snippet: Note: This is problem 25 on Project EulerProblem StatementThe Fibonacci sequence is defined by the recurrence relation:\[F_n = F_{n−1} + F_{n−2}\]where $F_1 = 1$ and $F_2 = 1$. title: Sum of Even Fibonacci Numbers
snippet: Note: This is problem 2 on Project EulerProblem StatementEach new term in the Fibonacci sequence is generated by adding the previous two terms.
